briefdescription.para: Constructor. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Destructor. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Copy constructor.
Assignment operator.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.38
player
The VideoPlayer to assign from.
The updated VideoPlayer.

briefdescription.para: Move constructor.
Move assignment operator.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_2_1.45
player
The VideoPlayer to move assign from.
The updated VideoPlayer.

briefdescription.para: Sets a URL of the video file to play.
Returns the URL of the video file. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets the player looping status. @SINCE_1_1.38.

parameterdescription.para: The new looping status: true or false

briefdescription.para: Returns the player looping status. @SINCE_1_1.38.

simplesect.para: True if player is looping, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Starts the video playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Pauses the video playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Stops the video playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets the player mute status. @SINCE_1_1.38.

parameterdescription.para: The new mute status, true is mute.

briefdescription.para: Returns the player mute status. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets the player volume. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Returns current volume factor. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets video rendering target. @SINCE_1_1.38.

parameterdescription.para: The target for video rendering, window surface or native image

briefdescription.para: Sets the position for playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Gets the current position in milliseconds. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Sets the area of video display. @SINCE_1_2.46 param[in] area The left-top position and size of the video display area.
Sets video display rotation @SINCE_1_1.38.
Returns rotation of current video display @SINCE_1_1.38.
Connect to this signal to be notified when a video playback have finished.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_1.38
A signal object to connect with.

briefdescription.para: Connect to this signal to be notified when a video playback have evented.

simplesect.para: A signal object to connect with.

briefdescription.para: Seeks forward by the specified number of milliseconds.
Seeks backward by the specified number of milliseconds.
Checks whether the video texture is supported.
Sets codec type.
Gets codec type.
Sets the display mode for playback.
Gets display mode.
Gets the media player of video player.
calls synchronization function in window system This function is called, the synchronization is started between UI(transparent hole) and video player.
calls desynchronization function in window system This function is called, the synchronization is ended between UI(transparent hole) and video player.
Raise the video player above the target video plaer.
Lower the video player to below the target video player.
Raise video player above all other sibling video players.
Lower video player to the bottom of all other sibling video players.
Video View has video player is connected to Window's Scene.
Video View has video player is disconnected to Window's Scene.
Sets auto rotation feature. If enabled, video will rotate automatically according to the video orientation.
Checks whether auto rotation feature is enabled.
Sets letter box feature. If enabled, the video will play in the video player's aspect ratio.
Checks whether letter box feature is enabled.
Sets the frame interpolation interval for smooth video playback. @SINCE_2_4.39.
Enables or disables offscreen frame rendering for video interpolation. @SINCE_2_4.39.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable offscreen frame rendering, false to disable
Native image for previous frame buffer
Native image for current frame buffer

briefdescription.para: Sets the video frame buffer for rendering. @SINCE_2_4.39.

parameterdescription.para: The video frame buffer source containing surface data

briefdescription.para: Creates a new instance of a VideoPlayer. @SINCE_1_1.38.
Creates a new instance of a VideoPlayer.

detaileddescription.para: If you want the video player works with Ui synchronous when video player is resized/moved, put the video view actor and the enabled syncMode.

parameterdescription.para: The synchronization mode between the UI (transparent hole) and VideoPlayer.

briefdescription.para: Creates a new instance of a VideoPlayer wrapper using an existing player handle with actor for synchronization.

parameterdescription.para: video view's actor instance for synchronization
The externally created native player handle with type information
The synchronization mode between the UI and VideoPlayer.

briefdescription.para: Downcast a handle to VideoPlayer handle.

detaileddescription.para: If handle points to a VideoPlayer the downcast produces valid handle. If not the returned handle is left uninitialized.

@SINCE_1_1.38
handle
Handle to an object
Handle to a VideoPlayer or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: Internal constructor @SINCE_1_1.38.
VideoPlayer class is used for video playback. @SINCE_1_1.38.
